points: Handled hardware, software, and network support
back: Diagnosed and resolved technical issues for 20+ clients daily, often within 15 minutes or less. Troubleshot hardware and software configuration, network connectivity, and system optimisation issues while communicating clearly with end-users to understand their needs and provide practical solutions.

points: Designing a scalable article generation workflow
back: Supporting development of an AI-assisted content pipeline for generating country-specific articles at scale. Initial work focuses on designing automation that can reduce manual publishing work and replace parts of an older WordPress-based workflow.
